artifact.note: This clean source-fixed replacement is the active runtime candidate. Its exact source, Foundation gate, all five Workbench targets, canonical four-file package, and five-case packaged focused set are sealed and green. The corrected force-authority canary and Full Campaign Debug have not run for this package; no prior-package result transfers. Release remains NO-GO.

foundation.summary: The retained source/resource contract gate passed inside the release-candidate build for its exact source HEAD.

workbench.summary: PC, PS4, PS5, XBOX_ONE, and XBOX_SERIES validation passed with one common CRC, zero first-party hard errors, and zero cleanup or monitored-boundary residue for the candidate source HEAD.

packagedFocusedAutotests.summary: All five canonical focused suites passed against the exact active staged packed candidate: 5 tests, zero failures, errors, or skips, all 40 envelope files rehashed, 11 approved hard diagnostics, zero unapproved hard diagnostics, and zero cleanup or spill residue. This deterministic-service result is non-certifying; the corrected canary remains next.

focusedForceAuthority.summary: State-only combat-presence, ownership-transition, and town-influence fixtures passed; native world, package, network, restart breadth, performance, and soak remain outside this result.

packagedFocusedAutotests.summary: All five individually named service suites passed against their exact prior staged packed candidate with 5/0/0/0 JUnit totals, valid exact diagnostic classification, zero unapproved hard diagnostics, 40 rehashed envelope files, and zero cleanup or spill residue. This historical result does not transfer to the active replacement package or certify any higher proof rung.

correctedForceAuthorityCanary.summary: The corrected force-authority canary passed against its exact prior packed candidate and clean harness: 35/35 focused assertions, 87/87 counted certification conditions, 9 PASS, 1 WARN, 0 FAIL, 1 BLOCKED, 0 SKIPPED, an exact 18-row zero-delta state diff, and final orphan cleanup. Its 2 hard diagnostics were both approved stock identity exceptions; classification was valid with zero unapproved diagnostics. All 10 envelope files were rehashed and cleanup/spill counters were zero. This historical scoped result remains accepted but non-certifying and does not transfer to the active replacement package.

fullCampaignDebug.error: Campaign Debug runtime completed with unapproved hard diagnostics.
fullCampaignDebug.summary: The prior full-profile wrapper completed a stable exact-package capture and rehashed all 10 envelope files with zero cleanup or spill residue. That mechanical capture success was not proof acceptance: runtime outcome success was false, certification remained red at 584 PASS, 49 WARN, 46 FAIL, 7 BLOCKED, and 1 SKIPPED with 5561/5687 required assertions proven, and the classifier rejected 10 unapproved diagnostics among 25 hard diagnostics. This immutable historical rejection does not transfer to the active replacement package.

proofRungs.label: Static/source/resource contracts
proofRungs.summary: Retained Foundation evidence is green inside the immutable candidate build for its exact source HEAD.

proofRungs.label: Enforce compile and configuration
proofRungs.summary: All five explicit Workbench targets are retained and green for the candidate source and canonical four-file package build.

proofRungs.label: Deterministic service contracts
proofRungs.summary: All five canonical packaged focused service suites passed against the exact active replacement package: 5 tests with zero failures, errors, or skips; all 40 envelope files rehashed; 11 approved and zero unapproved hard diagnostics; zero cleanup or spill residue.

proofRungs.label: Native engine-world behavior
proofRungs.summary: Neither the corrected force-authority canary nor Full Campaign Debug has run against the active replacement package; the accepted focused set is deterministic-service evidence only, and prior-package results remain historical.

proofRungs.label: Packaged dedicated server
proofRungs.summary: The active replacement candidate is sealed but has not been launched through the standard dedicated-server runtime gate.

proofRungs.label: Multiple clients, reconnect, and JIP
proofRungs.summary: Host, two-client, reconnect, late-join, and packet-disruption convergence are not certified.

proofRungs.label: Fresh-process restart and fault injection
proofRungs.summary: Selected journal, shutdown, field-vehicle, exact-QRF, counterattack, and rebuild cuts pass; the arbitrary full campaign graph and fault matrix remain open.

proofRungs.label: Performance and long soak
proofRungs.summary: The reported one-second hitch and long-campaign capacity limits have no current immutable-package soak evidence.

proofRungs.label: Canary release
proofRungs.summary: Blocked by every lower unproven release rung.

proofRungs.label: Stable certification
proofRungs.summary: No current matrix row is certified.

activeBlockers.summary: The active replacement package is sealed with green Foundation, all-target Workbench, and five-case packaged focused evidence. The deterministic-service rung is passed-noncertifying, but the corrected canary and Full Campaign Debug have not run, so native engine-world remains not-run; dedicated, multiplayer/JIP, restart breadth, performance, and soak remain pending.

Run the corrected force-authority canary against the exact active package next. Run Full Campaign Debug only if that canary is accepted; the prior package's red full-profile result and all prior scoped passes are historical only.
Known command-menu and modal-map defects remain open until source correction plus rendered packaged-client proof.
Natural sustained infantry and convoy travel, identical-waypoint suppression, and measured no-stutter behavior are not proven.
Campaign read-model convergence is not proven with host, two clients, reconnect, JIP, restart, and marker-cap boundaries.
The one-second hitch and bounded-history admission cliffs remain unclosed.
Configured mission breadth still exceeds mission-specific CE 3.11.1 behavioral parity and proof.
Development proof and destructive diagnostic surfaces have not yet been separated from the release package.
